revised_criteria: Require the simulator target to be identified as LTspice and require simulator_setup_requirements to state no execution/conversion is authorized under the present policy.
Require model_dependency_map to explicitly classify each dependency as present, supported, unverified, missing, or blocked by approval.
Require unresolved_deck_inputs and deck_prepare_blockers to distinguish missing inputs from owner-approval blockers while still concluding simulation_run_verify is blocked.
